headline: Lamine Yamal equals Pele's World Cup scoring record
body: Lamine Yamal became the second player aged 18 or younger to score in a World Cup game, matching Pele's achievement.
text:
🗣️ "Yamal is the real deal."

Analysis as Lamine Yamal joined Pele to become only the second player aged 18 or younger to open the scoring in a World Cup game.

Video
